name: Halloween Crisp Candy Corn Treats
recipeIngredient: Mixture of candy corn and Indian candy corn
Orange food coloring (can be purchased at cake decorating suppliers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and marshmallows; stir until smooth.
2. In a large bowl, mix rice cereal, candy corn, and miniature chocolate chips together.
3. Add orange food coloring to the marshmallow mixture or squirt over the cereal in the bowl.
4. Add the marshmallow mixture to the cereal mixture; stir quickly to combine.
5. Spread on a large buttered jelly roll pan.
6. Press with buttered hands.
7. While warm, press candy pumpkins spaced 1 to 1-1/2 to 2 inches apart.
8. Refrigerate and cut into squares.
Note: These are great for school treats for the class's Halloween party.
